• The best validated model was a Gaussian process regressor with 10-fold CV performance of about R² = 0.79
• Stronger hydrogels are associated with higher Hydrophobic-BA, higher Aromatic-PEA, moderate
• However, neither the observed data nor rescored optimization candidates support the target of >1 MPa; the
